response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payment Issue  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to appeal the recent account block due to suspicious payment activity that I did not initiate. The block occurred after I attempted to access my account, and I am seeking to have it unblocked.  

I am a regular user who has never made any payments to any third-party service. The suspicious activity appears to have been initiated by an unknown party, and I have no connection to the transactions. I am concerned that my account may have been misidentified or compromised.  

I would appreciate your assistance in reviewing the payment records and confirming that the activity was not related to me. Please let me know if further information is needed to resolve this matter.  

Thank you for your attention to this request.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
